mission_nl: Het versterken van organisaties en individuen om te excelleren in het digitale tijdperk door de kracht van AI te benutten.
source: Notion brandbook 'Brand Guidelines Synthwave' + Brand Colors Brand Kit + website portal (docs/PORTAL_BRANDING.md)

colors._primary_name: Dark blue / Wave Blue — THE brand accent (links, CTAs, active, KPI/section accents)

fonts.heading: Montserrat
fonts.note: Brandbook fonts: Montserrat Bold headings, Roboto body (18-24px). Web loads via Google Fonts; Arial/Helvetica is the offline fallback. Office (pptx/docx) sets the font name; install Montserrat/Roboto on the opener for exact rendering.

logos.usage: ALWAYS the COLOURED wave-swirl (Michaël, 2026-06-10): use symbol (synthwave-symbol.png, blue/cyan swirl) on every background incl. navy/dark; never the white or monochrome variant. On light docs the full-colour lockup (synthwave-logo.png: coloured swirl + black wordmark) is also fine.

rules.no_orange: NO orange/neon as branding. Amber (#d97706) only as a warning STATUS, never decoratively. Koningsdag orange is a manual seasonal exception.
rules.personality: minimalism + vintage-modern; empowering, accessible-yet-expert, pragmatic, human.
